newsSince: No new fundamental catalyst since June 9. The large YTD/recent move reflects a retail/social-media-driven spike (shares ran up to ~76% intraday on June 3); fundamentally Q1 2026 revenue fell 4% YoY at ~$196M, capacity utilization is low (~60%) with headcount cuts, though Microsystems/Photonics (+42%) and Wide-Bandgap SiC/GaN (+152% to $15.1M) are bright spots.

verdicts.rankRationale: Scaling/edge-compute foundry lens: the alpha case did NOT strengthen since June 9 - the move was retail/social-media-driven (June 3 spike) while Q1 rev fell 4% YoY and utilization is ~60%. Wide-bandgap +152% is a real but small offset; specialty-foundry thesis intact, fundamentals slightly softer.
verdicts.bull: Pure-play SiC/GaN + photonics specialty foundry; WBG revenue +152%.
verdicts.neutral: Thesis intact but recent move is sentiment, not earned by fundamentals.
verdicts.bear: Q1 rev -4% YoY, ~60% utilization, headcount cuts; frothy retail-driven +82% YTD.
